settings.title: Valentine's Pickup Windows Are Open for Booking
settings.excerpt: Reserve a time, skip the line, and tell us if you would rather we surprise you.
settings.body:
Our busiest day of the year is nearly here, so Petalry is taking Valentine's bookings now to keep things calm.

Choose a pickup window when you order and your bouquet will be wrapped and waiting, no line to stand in. Delivery slots are filling, so the sooner the better.

If you are unsure what to send, leave it to us. Tell us a color or a feeling and a budget, and we will build something for the person you have in mind.
